item.title: eFaas should become the national standard
item.description: Stronger political will is needed to fully realise the potential of the authentication service and truly bring government services, and Digital Identity, into the digital now. This article was published on Maldives Financial Review - Read online on Maldives Financial Review.

item.title: Financial Technology 101
item.description: New, or ‘disruptive,’ technologies and innovations have always seen active opposition from those who stand to lose entrenched, or privileged, market positions. This article was published on Maldives Financial Review - Read online on Maldives Financial Review.

item.title: Analysis of Monzo through the lens of Entrepreneurial Ecosystems
item.description: This article is a stripped-down version of an academic report I’ve written on fintech ecosystems and what role a keystone organisations plays in it. Background This article analyzes Monzo – a challenger bank based in the UK to understand the business model and the role they play inside the ecosystem. The ecosystem analysis will be done through the lens of academic literature on business ecosystems to further understand the strategies behind the ecosystem.

item.title: Hello.
item.description: Hello, I’m Haris. I am an aspiring Product Manager (Growth/Marketing) from Maldives. I used to be a software engineer. I started coding at the age of 12 by editing webpages on the internet and tinkering with Python. Due to my passion for building products, I have shifted from a tech role to a product role, especially towards product marketing and growth. I prefer working with people from multiple disciplines (ui/ux, tech, bizdev, marketing, etc.

item.title: Challenges with accepting online payments in Maldives
item.description: This article is outdated and does not reflect on the current environment. Entrepreneurs and tech geeks has attempted to create internet based businesses in the Maldives since the early 2000s. Most of them are no longer around due the challenges they faced with running an internet venture. One of the very common challenges shared by most entrepreneurs and software developers of Maldives is not having access to an affordable payment gateway solution.
